description: Visual Studio 2022 is open with the 'SecurityToolsSuite.sln' solution. The 'IncidentAgent' and 'AuditTool' console applications currently contain duplicate 'CryptoEngine.cs' files, causing maintainability issues. Refactor the solution by extracting 'CryptoEngine.cs' into a new C# Shared Project named 'SecurityCore' and referencing it from both original projects. Define the conditional compilation symbol 'IR_AGENT' for the 'IncidentAgent' project and 'AUDIT_TOOL' for the 'AuditTool' project. The final solution must rebuild without errors.

metadata.expected_ir_output: [IR_AGENT] CryptoEngine initialized for Incident Response Mode
metadata.expected_audit_output: [AUDIT_TOOL] CryptoEngine initialized for Audit Logging Mode
